'''yathulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cebocephaly|cebocephaly]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-th-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cebocephaly|cebocephaly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yathulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæthilith|yæthilith]] || [[word:yæthilij|yæthilij]] || [[word:yæthilish|yæthilish]] || [[word:yæthili|yæthili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yathuthuluth|yathuthuluth]] || [[word:yathuthuluj|yathuthuluj]] || [[word:yathuthulush|yathuthulush]] || [[word:yathuthulu|yathuthulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yathuluth|yathuluth]] || [[word:yathuluj|yathuluj]] || [[word:yathulush|yathulush]] || [[word:yathulu|yathulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yathufluth|yathufluth]] || [[word:yathufluj|yathufluj]] || [[word:yathuflush|yathuflush]] || [[word:yathufluf|yathufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yathuluthu|yathuluthu]] || [[word:yathuluju|yathuluju]] || [[word:yathulushu|yathulushu]] || [[word:yathuluku|yathuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yathuluth|yathuluth]] || [[word:yathuluj|yathuluj]] || [[word:yathulush|yathulush]] || [[word:yathulu|yathulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yathuluthul|yathuluthul]] || [[word:yathulujul|yathulujul]] || [[word:yathulushul|yathulushul]] || [[word:yathulukul|yathulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yathuluthuthu|yathuluthuthu]] || [[word:yathulujuju|yathulujuju]] || [[word:yathulushushu|yathulushushu]] || [[word:yathuluku|yathuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yathuluthun|yathuluthun]] || [[word:yathulujun|yathulujun]] || [[word:yathulushun|yathulushun]] || [[word:yathulukun|yathulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yathuluthuoro|yathuluthuoro]] || [[word:yathulujuoro|yathulujuoro]] || [[word:yathulushuoro|yathulushuoro]] || [[word:yathulukuoro|yathulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
